---
name: Tool Request
about: Suggest a tool to add to the list
title: "Add [Tool Name] to [Category]"
labels: ["tool-request", "needs-review"]
assignees: ""
---

## Tool Details

**Tool Name:**
<!-- The official name of the tool -->

**URL:**
<!-- Link to the tool's official homepage -->

**Proposed Category:**
<!-- Which section in README.md should this go in? -->

**Suggested Description:**
<!-- One factual sentence describing what the tool does (not marketing language) -->

**Platform:**
<!-- Web / macOS / Windows / iOS / Android / Linux / Cross-platform -->

**Pricing:**
<!-- Free / Free + Paid / Paid / One-time / Free / Self-hosted -->

---

## Why Should This Be Included?

<!-- Why is this tool valuable to UI/UX designers? What problem does it solve?
     Please be specific — "it's great" is not sufficient. -->

---

## Checklist

- [ ] The tool is not already in the list
- [ ] The tool URL is accessible without login
- [ ] The tool is actively maintained (updated within the last 12 months)
- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guidelines](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have no financial relationship with this tool (or I'm disclosing it below)

**Disclosure (if any):**
<!-- Are you affiliated with this tool? Disclose here. We welcome tool makers to submit their own work, but transparency is required. -->
